---
name: Documentation governance
description: Documentation ownership, no-duplication and AI context rules.
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---
- One owner per fact; link instead of duplicating long content.
- `AGENTS.md` and AI context files must stay concise.
- Update status/backlog/done-log only when they own affected facts.
- Remove compatibility pointers once references are migrated.
- Check links after moving or deleting docs.
